paper_title: LITMUS∞: SMT-Verified Memory Model Portability Checking for Cross-Architecture Concurrent Code

paper_claims.claim: 137 litmus tests × 10 architectures = 1,370 test-model pairs
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v6/portability_matrix.json (1,370 entries)
paper_claims.reproducible_command: cd litmus_inf && python3 -c "from portcheck import PATTERNS; print(len(PATTERNS))"

paper_claims.claim: 1,370/1,370 Z3 certificate coverage (1,095 UNSAT proofs + 275 SAT witnesses, zero timeouts) with Alethe proof certificates
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v8/alethe_proofs/alethe_summary.json. 1,095 Alethe resolution proofs + 275 self-certifying SAT models.

paper_claims.claim: 228/228 herd7 internal consistency for CPU models (Wilson CI [98.3%, 100%])
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/herd7_comparison.json. .litmus files and validate_herd7_full.sh for independent verification.

paper_claims.claim: 108/108 GPU SMT internal consistency + 94/94 GPU external cross-validation
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/smt_validation.json. External cross-validation against 33 published litmus test outcomes, 32 PTX spec guarantees, 23 Vulkan spec guarantees, 6 known GPU bugs.
paper_claims.reproducible_command: cd litmus_inf && python3 smt_validation.py && python3 gpu_external_validation.py

paper_claims.claim: 99 UNSAT + 72 SAT + 10 partial machine-checked fence proofs (181 total unsafe CPU pairs)
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/smt_validation.json

paper_claims.claim: 170/171 DSL-to-.cat correspondence (99.4%, Wilson CI [96.8%, 99.9%])
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v5/dsl_cat_correspondence.json. x86-TSO: 57/57, AArch64: 57/57, RISC-V: 56/57. mp_fence_wr mismatch documented.

paper_claims.claim: 86.1% exact-match, 93.3% top-3 on 238 independently-documented snippets (203 curated + 35 independently sourced)
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/benchmark_suite.py. 35 independently sourced from 18 documented public repositories.

paper_claims.claim: 93.0% exact-match, 94.0% top-3 on 501 expanded author-sampled benchmark (Wilson CI [90.4%, 94.9%])
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v6/expanded_benchmark.json. 466/501 exact, 471/501 top-3. Author-sampled from 10 projects; higher accuracy reflects absence of independently-sourced hard cases.

paper_claims.claim: Severity classification: 423 data_race, 82 security, 130 benign (635 operationally-identified total)
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v5/severity_classification.json. CWE-calibrated, not CVE-validated. 275 of 635 also carry SMT SAT witnesses.

paper_claims.claim: Denotational semantics D⟦·⟧ cross-validated: 428/432 (99.1%) agreement with operational engine on CPU patterns
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/dsl_denotational_semantics.py. 4 disagreements all on RISC-V asymmetric fence patterns.

paper_claims.claim: Adversarial benchmark: 23 snippets, 7 domains, 13.0% exact-match / 21.7% top-3
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/adversarial_benchmark.py. Quantifies 93%→13% author-sampling bias gap.

paper_claims.claim: TCB analysis: 11 components with Verified/Trusted-Axiom/Implementation-Trust classifications
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/tcb_analysis.py. 10,968 internal LoC enumerated.

paper_claims.claim: Lean 4 proof sketches for Theorems 1, 4, 5, 6, 7 with sorry'd subgoals
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/lean/LitmusInf.lean. Type-checks with sorry annotations.

paper_claims.claim: Compositional reasoning: 4 strategies (disjoint exact, SC-shared exact, Owicki-Gries sound, conservative RG sound)
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v6/compositional_analysis.json. 5 programs × 3 architectures.

paper_claims.claim: SMT-based discriminating litmus test synthesis (2-pattern minimal set)
paper_claims.evidence: Independently rediscovers MP and LB patterns.

paper_claims.claim: pip-installable CLI (litmus-check) with JSON and --emit-certificate output
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/litmus_check.py, litmus_inf/setup.py. Install from source only, not published to PyPI.

paper_claims.claim: Conditional Soundness (Theorem 1) with RF×CO decomposition lemma
paper_claims.evidence: paper.tex. Paper proof. Conditional on permissiveness assumption. Empirically supported by 228/228 herd7.

paper_claims.claim: Fence Menu Minimality (Theorem 2) — trivially true by construction
paper_claims.evidence: paper.tex. Argmin by construction. NP-hardness of whole-program version acknowledged.

paper_claims.claim: Scope-Aware Fence Sufficiency (Theorem 3) — sufficient condition only
paper_claims.evidence: paper.tex. Sufficient condition. Converse failure acknowledged.

paper_claims.claim: Lean 4 proof sketches for Theorems 1-7; sorry'd subgoals delineate verified skeleton from remaining obligations
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/lean/LitmusInf.lean. Alethe proof certificates for all UNSAT verdicts.

paper_claims.claim: 642 meaningful differential tests + 3,000 determinism checks, all passing
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/differential_testing.json

paper_claims.claim: Fence cost: ARM 50.9% ± 32.4%, RISC-V 66.5% ± 26.8% (analytical weights, not hardware)
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/fence_optimization.json

paper_claims.claim: Full 1,370-pair analysis: mean 397ms, individual patterns <1ms
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/timing.json

honesty_notes.pattern_level_scope: 137 fixed patterns, not arbitrary programs. Cannot discover novel bugs. No coverage audit against real bug databases.
honesty_notes.compositionality: Four strategies: disjoint (exact), SC-shared (exact), Owicki-Gries for ordered shared vars (sound), conservative RG (sound but imprecise). General shared-variable case remains conservative.
honesty_notes.smt_internal_consistency: Both encodings by same authors. Internal consistency, not independent validation.
honesty_notes.gpu_validation: 108/108 GPU internal consistency + 94/94 external cross-validation against published litmus test outcomes, PTX/Vulkan spec guarantees, and known GPU bugs. Not hardware-tested.
honesty_notes.herd7_agreement: 228/228 validates against pre-computed expected outcomes from herd7 .cat specs. Internal consistency, not running herd7 directly.
honesty_notes.1_of_171_discrepancy: mp_fence_wr on RISC-V: DSL expressiveness gap, not model error.
honesty_notes.benchmark_238: 238 snippets: 203 curated + 35 independently sourced. 86.1% exact-match (86.1%), 93.3% top-3. Independent snippets: 25.7% exact / 65.7% top-3.
honesty_notes.benchmark_501: 501 snippets systematically sampled from 10 open-source projects by tool authors. Not independently curated. 93.0% exact, 94.0% top-3. Higher accuracy reflects absence of independently-sourced hard cases.
honesty_notes.false_negatives: 7 non-exact cases in 238-snippet benchmark: 4 SAFE, 3 NEUTRAL, 0 UNSAFE misclassifications.
honesty_notes.fence_costs: Analytical weight reductions, not measured hardware latencies.
honesty_notes.mechanization: Lean 4 proof sketches for Theorems 1,4,5,6,7 with sorry'd subgoals. Alethe proof certificates for all 1,095 UNSAT verdicts. Full mechanization of sorry'd subgoals is future work.
honesty_notes.theorem2_triviality: Trivially true by argmin construction. Explicitly acknowledged.
honesty_notes.severity_taxonomy: Rule-based mapping from pattern name to category. CWE-calibrated. Not validated against specific CVE instances.
honesty_notes.z3_trusted_computing_base: Z3 remains in TCB. All 1,095 UNSAT verdicts carry Alethe resolution proofs checkable by external validators (Carcara). All 275 SAT models verified by direct substitution. TCB formally enumerated: 11 components with explicit trust classifications.
honesty_notes.adversarial_benchmark: 23 out-of-distribution snippets show 13% accuracy, quantifying author-sampling bias. Not a representative sample of all possible concurrent code.
honesty_notes.denotational_semantics: 428/432 (99.1%) agreement with operational engine. 4 disagreements on RISC-V asymmetric fence patterns are documented expressiveness gaps, not correctness bugs.
honesty_notes.no_human_studies: No user study or deployment evaluation.
honesty_notes.no_pypi: pip install from source only, not published to PyPI.
honesty_notes.no_github_publishing: Not published as a public GitHub repository or package.
honesty_notes.conservative_models: May report false positives. 3/25 hardware points are conservative.

reproduction_instructions.compile_paper: cd litmus_inf && pdflatex paper.tex && pdflatex paper.tex
